type.en: Reason the facility does not meet the criteria for NPRI
type.fr: La raison pour laquelle cette installation ne rencontre pas les critères de déclaration de l'INRP

comments.comment:
The facility is not required to report Parts 1A, 1B or 2 substances since employees did not work a total of ≥ 20,000 hours during the 2022 calendar year and the facility did not take part in activities to which the employee threshold does not apply, as per Section 5.2 (Reporting for Part 1A substances – Core substances), Section 5.3 (Reporting for Part 1B substances – Alternate threshold substances), and Section 6.1 (Reporting criteria for Part 2 substances) of the NPRI Guidance.

The facility is not required to report Part 3 substances since: (1) prescribed activities as per Table 8 of the NPRI Guidance regardless of the number of hours worked by employees did not take place at the Power Plant during the 2022 calendar year; and (2) employees did not work a total of ≥ 20,000 hours during the 2022 calendar year for those activities listed in Table 8 of the NPRI Guidance where employee threshold applies. For activities to which the employee threshold applies in Table 8 of the NPRI Guidance, both criteria must be met (activity must take place and the employee threshold must be met), for reporting of Part 3 substances.

The facility is required to report Part 4 substances since the CACs released to air from stationary, external combustion equipment do not exceed the reporting thresholds described in Section 8 of the NPRI Guidance.

The facility is not required to report Part 5 substances as per the NPRI Guidance, since Part 5 speciated VOCs from the combustion of stationary combustion equipment are each less than the 1 tonne reporting to air threshold for the 2022 calendar year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We had a H2SO4 pump suction line rot through(hydrogen grooving).The sulfuric acid drained on the ground outside of the containment . The acid was neutralized to a ph of 7.9 and the contaminated soil removed for proper disposal .
